name: ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage
definition: Approximate age of the oldest non-deleted message in the queue; primary backlog latency signal.
absence_means: No sustained backlog, queue idle, or metric absent for the selected queue.
cardinality_footguns: Keep grouped by queue or region only; never by message identifiers.

name: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
definition: Approximate number of messages available to be received immediately.
absence_means: Queue has no ready backlog, queue idle, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Use as queue depth, not as exact inventory.

name: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible
definition: Approximate number of in-flight messages currently hidden by the visibility timeout.
absence_means: No in-flight work, low traffic, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with receives and deletes; high values can be healthy during parallel processing.

name: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayed
definition: Approximate number of delayed messages not yet available for receive.
absence_means: No delayed workload, queue not using delay features, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Do not mix with ready backlog when explaining urgent lag.

name: NumberOfMessagesSent
definition: Count of messages added to the queue during the period.
absence_means: No producer traffic, queue idle, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Treat as per-second throughput for operational views; retries may still be hidden by dedup on FIFO queues.

name: NumberOfMessagesReceived
definition: Count of messages returned by receive calls during the period.
absence_means: No receive activity, queue idle, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: May exceed unique business work because duplicates and retries count again.

name: NumberOfMessagesDeleted
definition: Count of successful delete actions during the period.
absence_means: No completed processing, queue idle, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Can exceed receive counts because deletes may follow repeated receives of the same message.

name: NumberOfEmptyReceives
definition: Count of receive calls that returned no messages.
absence_means: No polling waste, no traffic, or long polling is working well.
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with receive throughput and backlog; high values alone do not prove failure.

name: SentMessageSize
definition: Size of messages added to the queue during the period.
absence_means: No send traffic or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Prefer average or max trends; summed size is rarely a useful KPI.

name: NumberOfDeduplicatedSentMessages
definition: Count of FIFO send attempts suppressed by deduplication.
absence_means: Queue is standard, dedup disabled, or no duplicate send attempts occurred.
cardinality_footguns: Meaningful mainly for FIFO queues; do not use as a universal SQS KPI.

name: ApproximateNumberOfGroupsWithInflightMessages
definition: Approximate count of message groups with at least one in-flight message.
absence_means: Queue is not FIFO or fair-queue-capable, or the metric is absent.
cardinality_footguns: Queue-level metric only; do not invent group-id splits without discovered fields.

name: ApproximateNumberOfNoisyGroups
definition: Approximate count of noisy groups in a fair queue.
absence_means: Fair queues not enabled or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Keep queue-level only unless Stage 2 confirms a tenant key.

name: ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessageInQuietGroups
definition: Approximate age of the oldest message among quiet groups in a fair queue.
absence_means: Fair queues not enabled, no quiet-group backlog, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Use as comparison against overall oldest age, not a universal SQS metric.

name: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisibleInQuietGroups
definition: Approximate number of visible messages in quiet groups of a fair queue.
absence_means: Fair queues not enabled, no quiet-group visible backlog, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Compare to total visible depth to detect noisy-group concentration.

name: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisibleInQuietGroups
definition: Approximate number of in-flight messages in quiet groups of a fair queue.
absence_means: Fair queues not enabled, no quiet-group in-flight work, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Use as a quiet-tenant baseline, not as a universal saturation KPI.

name: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesDelayedInQuietGroups
definition: Approximate number of delayed messages in quiet groups of a fair queue.
absence_means: Fair queues not enabled, no quiet-group delayed work, or metric absent.
cardinality_footguns: Delay may be intentional; compare with non-quiet-group depth before escalating.

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: SQS service metrics do not expose direct spend. Use polling efficiency, payload size, and backlog patterns as cost-adjacent proxies until billing data is integrated.
absence_means: Not applicable in the core SQS service metric family.
cardinality_footguns: Do not invent cost widgets from queue health metrics alone.
